title: Create Immersive Unnecessary Shaft
description: Bridge Create's Stress Unit to rotational machines from Immersive Engineering using the new treated wood shafts !
body:
Nobody asked for it and now it is here !

Create Immersive Unnecesary Shaft (CIUS in short) allows for the groundbreaking ability to bridge Immersive Engineering's rotational machines (namely the Windmill, Waterwheel and the Dynamo) to Create's rotational power.

This mod adds only one new block, the treated wood shaft, made from 3 treated wood planks. The treated wood shaft acts like any create andesite shaft (and can even be encased), while being able to be powered from Immersive Engineering's Windmill and Waterwheel. What's more, you can now generate IE electricty from your contraption, by hooking up your Create machinery to IE's dynamo - using the treated wood shaft of course. Doing this, the dynamo will draw as much power as it can, bringing the network to its maximum capacity. The more SU it draws, the more power it generates !
